name: Perplexity AI
tagline: The answer engine that always shows its work.
problem: Search engines give you ten links and leave you to read everything yourself. Perplexity reads the web, synthesises the answer, and cites every source — in one shot.

name: Runway ML
tagline: Hollywood-grade video generation. No film school required.
problem: Professional video demands expensive equipment and days of post-production. Runway compresses that pipeline into a text prompt.

name: Gamma
tagline: Presentations that write and design themselves.
problem: Building decks burns hours on layout before you get to the thinking. Gamma converts rough notes into a fully designed presentation in under two minutes.

name: Harvey AI
tagline: The AI legal associate that never sleeps.
problem: Legal research, contract drafting, and due diligence are extraordinarily time-intensive. Harvey is trained on legal datasets to accelerate all three.

name: Cursor
tagline: The code editor where AI is the co-pilot, not a plugin.
problem: Traditional AI coding tools only see the file you have open. Cursor rebuilds the IDE around AI — it understands your entire codebase contextually.

name: ElevenLabs
tagline: Any voice. Any language. One click.
problem: Professional voice-overs require studios and scheduling. ElevenLabs generates hyper-realistic synthetic voices from typed text — with emotion and accent control.

name: Clay
tagline: Your entire sales research pipeline, automated.
problem: Sales teams burn hours manually enriching lead data from LinkedIn and databases. Clay connects 50+ data sources and does it automatically — personalised outreach included.

name: Granola
tagline: The meeting notes app that listens so you don't have to.
problem: You can't take great notes and be fully present in a meeting simultaneously. Granola transcribes, structures, and summarises every meeting automatically.

name: Midjourney
tagline: Describe it. See it. Own it.
problem: Commissioning original visual art is expensive and slow. Midjourney generates commercially usable images from plain-text descriptions in seconds.

name: Descript
tagline: Edit video like a Word doc — because now you can.
problem: Video editing has a steep technical curve even for simple tasks. Descript lets you edit video by editing the transcript — delete a word, that clip disappears.
